SEARCH
Package aim4.vehicle

Interface HumanDrivenVehicleSimView

All Superinterfaces:
HumanDrivenVehicleDriverView, VehicleDriverView, VehicleSimView
public interface HumanDrivenVehicleSimView extends HumanDrivenVehicleDriverView, VehicleSimView
The interface of a manually-driven vehicle from the viewpoint of a simulator.
